rules.name: Dangerous eval/exec usage
rules.message: Avoid eval()/exec() — use ast.literal_eval() for safe parsing

rules.name: Subprocess with shell=True
rules.message: subprocess with shell=True is a command injection risk — use list form instead

rules.name: Bare except clause
rules.message: Bare except catches all exceptions including KeyboardInterrupt — use 'except Exception:' at minimum

rules.name: Mutable default argument
rules.message: Mutable default arguments persist between calls — use None and initialize inside function

rules.name: Untrusted pickle.load
rules.message: pickle.load() on untrusted data enables arbitrary code execution

rules.name: Hardcoded password/secret
rules.message: Hardcoded credential detected — use environment variables or config files

rules.name: SQL string formatting
rules.message: SQL injection risk — use parameterized queries with placeholder syntax

rules.name: type: ignore comment
rules.message: type: ignore suppresses type checking — verify this is intentional
